zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal於1256年3月21日出生在馬克 布藍登波格時，他的父親Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg43歲，母親Jutta II of Saxony28歲。他於1299年1月15日與Gräfin Agnes von Bayern在德國貝也明陳結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年2月14日在德國布藍登波格享年61歲，埋葬在德國賀瑟可萊斯 馬布-比登可普福馬布格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal于1256年3月21日出生在馬克 布藍登波格时，他的父亲Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg43岁，母亲Jutta II of Saxony28岁。他于1299年1月15日与Gräfin Agnes von Bayern在德国貝也明陳结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1318年2月14日在德国布藍登波格享年61岁，埋葬在德国賀瑟可萊斯 馬布-比登可普福馬布格。

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: "Lackland"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Durham): topographic name from Lawkland in Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old Norse laukr ‘leek’ + land ‘land’.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal was born on 21 March 1256, in Mark Brandenburg, his father, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, was 43 and his mother, Jutta II of Saxony, was 28. He married Gräfin Agnes von Bayern on 15 January 1299, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 14 February 1318, in Brandenburg, Germany, at the age of 61, and was buried in Marburg, Marburg-Biedenkopf, Hesse, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal est né le 21 mars 1256, à Mark Brandenburg, son père, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Jutta II of Saxony, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Gräfin Agnes von Bayern le 15 janvier 1299, à München, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1318, à Brandenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Marburg, Kreis Marburg-Biedenkopf, Hessen, Allemagne.

de.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: Brandenburg an der Havel, Kreis Westhavelland, Kurfürstentum Brandenburg, Preußen
de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal am 21. März 1256 in Mark Brandenburg geboren wurde, war sein Vater Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg 43 und seine Mutter Jutta II of Saxony 28. Er hat am 15. Januar 1299 in München, Bayern, Deutschland Gräfin Agnes von Bayern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1318 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Brandenburg, Deutschland und wurde in Marburg, Kreis Marburg-Biedenkopf, Hessen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal è nato il il 21 marzo 1256 nel Mark Brandenburg, il suo padre, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Jutta II of Saxony, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Gräfin Agnes von Bayern il 15 gennaio 1299, nel München, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1318, nel Brandenburg, Germania, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Marburg, Kreis Marburg-Biedenkopf, Hessen, Germania.

ko.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: 프레우ss 커프u르스투 브랜덴버그 크레이스 웨스스아벨랜드 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal(이)가 1256년 3월 21일 마크 브랜덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Jutta II of Saxony(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1299년 1월 15일 독일 베이른 u천에서 Gräfin Agnes von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 2월 14일 독일 브랜덴버그에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 헤센 크레이스 마버그-비덴코p프 마버그에 묻혔다.

pt.21 March 1256–14 February 1318: 21 de março de 1256–14 de fevereiro de 1318
pt.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: Brandenburg an der Havel, Kreis Westhavelland, Kurfürstentum Brandenburg, Preußen
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal nasceu em 21 de março de 1256, em Mark Brandenburg, seu pai, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Jutta II of Saxony, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Gräfin Agnes von Bayern em 15 de janeiro de 1299, em München, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1318, em Brandenburg, Alemanha, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Marburg, Kreis Marburg-Biedenkopf, Hessen, Alemanha.

ru.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: брэнденбург ан дир хавел, крис веставелланд, курфuрстентум брэнденбург, Пруссия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal родился 21 марта 1256 г. в местности марк брэнденбург, его отцу по имени Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Jutta II of Saxony, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Gräfin Agnes von Bayern 15 января 1299 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1318 г. в местности брэнденбург, Германия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности марбург, крис марбург-биеденкопф, Гессен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich I "Lackland" Unknown , Margrave of Brandenburg-Stendal nació el 21 de marzo de 1256, en Mark Brandenburg, su papá, Markgraf Johann I. von  Brandenburg, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Jutta II of Saxony, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Gräfin Agnes von Bayern el 15 de enero de 1299, en München, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1318, en Brandenburg, Alemania, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Marburg, Kreis Marburg-Biedenkopf, Hessen, Alemania.
